texto: So at least I could rest my soul knowing I had truly given it my all. And when my future child asks why I stopped pursuing a dream I had had for so many years, I can say with no regret, "The love I have for you and your mother is far greater than any dream.
explicacao: Citação de Rico Lamoureux sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “So at least I could rest my soul knowing I had truly given it my all. And when my future child as…” articula familia, dreams, love em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como love e regret.

frase_original: So at least I could rest my soul knowing I had truly given it my all. And when my future child asks why I stopped pursuing a dream I had had for so many years, I can say with no regret, "The love I have for you and your mother is far greater than any dream.

texto: Because you do it out of passion, as well as hoping it will bring better opportunity. It's like you're investing in yourself, so although you don't see anything up front there's always the possibility that the kind of compensation that is priceless can come later. For someone who's striving to get where they're meant to be, opportunity over a quick buck is something that will always be taken by the wise. Because they know opportunity is king, and all other benefits will follow...
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Rico Lamoureux: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Because you do it out of passion, as well as hoping it will bring better opportunity. It's like y…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que trabalho, career-choices, esperanca pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e esperanca.
